decision.statement: What should Mindmeld build as the next game after Trivia?
decision.description: Choose the strongest next game for social conversation, reliable party play, and practical MVP delivery.

options.label: Coordinates
options.description: 2D social alignment game with centroid and outlier reveals.

options.label: Anonymous Match
options.description: Players match anonymous responses to authors after conversation.

options.label: Majority Mind
options.description: Players predict what the group majority will choose on subjective prompts.

Coordinates.text: Outlier vs cluster reveals naturally trigger debate

Anonymous Match.text: Identity reveals create strong story-driven discussion

Majority Mind.text: Good social chatter, but usually shorter and lighter

Coordinates.text: Simultaneous dot reveal plus centroid is visually strong

Anonymous Match.text: One-by-one response reveals land well in groups

Majority Mind.text: Distribution reveal is clear but less dramatic

Coordinates.text: Moderate: drag input plus plotting and centroid math

Anonymous Match.text: High: multi-phase flow, assignment UI, reveal sequencing

Majority Mind.text: Low: option selection, prediction, and distribution scoring

Coordinates.text: Mostly prompt curation; little free-text risk

Anonymous Match.text: Free text and attribution can require stronger moderation

Majority Mind.text: Low moderation burden with constrained response options

Coordinates.text: Needs good prompt and axis pairs to stay fresh

Anonymous Match.text: Needs a steady stream of strong open-ended prompts

Majority Mind.text: Easy to generate many short subjective prompts

Coordinates.text: Different prompts and axes keep rounds varied

Anonymous Match.text: Still fun, but repeated groups may learn each other quickly

Majority Mind.text: Can feel repetitive unless prompt quality stays high

Coordinates.text: Main risk is unclear axes; manageable with curation

Anonymous Match.text: Weak responses or low engagement can flatten a round

Majority Mind.text: Simple loop is robust under varied group energy

Coordinates.text: Distinctive social alignment mechanic that feels native to platform

Anonymous Match.text: Very on-brand for conversation-first social play

Majority Mind.text: Solid party loop but less unique as a platform identity
